SEARCH
Package cpsc2150.extendedConnectX.models

Interface IGameBoard

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbsGameBoard, GameBoard, GameBoardMem
public interface IGameBoard
IGameBoard is an interface that defines behavior for all GameBoard objects. GameBoard have constants MAX_ROW, MAX_COL, and NUM_TO_WIN. This interface specifies the ability access, mutate, and return.

  • Method Details

    • checkIfFree

      default boolean checkIfFree(int c)
      Checks to see if the column can accept the token
      Parameters:
      c - , the column being checked
      Returns:
      true if the column can accept the token, false otherwise

    • dropToken

      void dropToken(char p, int c)
      Drops a token for the player in the given column.
      Parameters:
      p - the players token to be placed
      c - the column the token will be dropped in.

    • checkForWin

      default boolean checkForWin(int c)
      Checks if the players last placed token results in a win.
      Parameters:
      c - , the column the token is being placed in.
      Returns:
      true if the token does result in a win (5 in a row), false otherwise.

    • checkTie

      default boolean checkTie()
      check if the game results in a tie
      Returns:
      true if there are not one kind of token 5 times in a row either vertically, Horizontally, or diagonally, otherwise return false.

    • checkHorizWin

      default boolean checkHorizWin(BoardPosition pos, char p)
      Checks if the last placed token results in 5 in a row horizontally.
      Parameters:
      pos - , position of the last placed token
      p - , the player that placed the last token
      Returns:
      true if the last placed token results in 5 in a row horizontally, false otherwise.

    • checkVertWin

      default boolean checkVertWin(BoardPosition pos, char p)
      Checks if the last placed token results in 5 in a row vertically.
      Parameters:
      pos - , position of the last placed token
      p - , the player that placed the last token
      Returns:
      true if the last placed token results in 5 in a row vertically, false otherwise.

    • checkDiagWin

      default boolean checkDiagWin(BoardPosition pos, char p)
      Checks if last placed token result in 5 in a row diagonally
      Parameters:
      pos - , the position of the last placed token
      p - , player that placed the token
      Returns:
      true if there are 5 tokens in a row diagonally, return false otherwise

    • whatsAtPos

      char whatsAtPos(BoardPosition pos)
      Checks what's at a specific position on the gameboard
      Parameters:
      pos - , the position being checked on the gameboard
      Returns:
      the token at the position

    • isPlayerAtPos

      default boolean isPlayerAtPos(BoardPosition pos, char player)
      checks what token is in the requested position
      Parameters:
      pos - , the position getting checked
      player - , the token being looked for the in the requested position
      Returns:
      true if the token in the position is the same as the player's token, false otherwise

    • getRows

      int getRows()
      Standard getter for rows
      Returns:
      rows, an int

      int getColumns()
      Standard getter for cols
      Returns:
      cols, an int

      int getNumToWin()
      Standard getter for numToWin
      Returns:
      numToWin, an int
